Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: keep SeriesFilterChart chip colors in sync with Plotly line colors

Previously, hiding a series shifted the remaining series to new positions
in Plotly's auto color cycle, making chip dot colors diverge from the
actual line colors.

Fix: stamp each DataSeries with an explicit color (PLOTLY_COLORS[i])
before passing the filtered subset to LineChart. LineChart now reads
`s.color` and sets it as the explicit `line.color` / `marker.color` on
each Plotly trace. Chip dots and chart lines always share the same color
regardless of which series are hidden.

- types.ts: add optional `color?: string` to DataSeries interface
- LineChart.tsx: spread `{ color: s.color }` into marker/line when set
- SeriesFilterChart.tsx: create `coloredSeries` with PLOTLY_COLORS[i]
  assigned before filtering; filter coloredSeries (not raw series) for chart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 盤點頁前日用量負數修正 + 叫貨建議值智慧演算法

commit.message:
Handle non-JSON error responses in login and password reset

Wrap ReadFromJsonAsync calls in try-catch for JsonException, matching the
pattern already used in RegisterAsync. Prevents unhandled exceptions when
the API returns non-JSON responses such as rate limit errors or HTML
error pages.

commit.message:
Make Stripe and Monei payment credentials optional to prevent startup crashes

Changed STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET from required to optional environment variables. This prevents the server from showing unnecessary warnings when these payment providers are not being used. The payment services already handle missing credentials gracefully by returning mock payment URLs.

Also added MONEI credentials to the optional list for consistency.

- GET executors/:id/tasks/:taskId/prompts/:promptId — poll for responses

where permission prompts from Claude Code are relayed through CV-Hub
to the user's Claude.ai session.

commit.message:
fix: sync humanizer banned words with Tone of Voice guide, unify editorial pipeline

Added missing banned words from BOATTOMORROW_TONE_OF_VOICE1.md to HUMANIZER_SYSTEM_PROMPT:
nestled, breathtaking, unforgettable, world-class, paradise, stunning,
crystal-clear, luxury, exclusive. Added banned phrases: dream vacation,
paradise on earth, luxury experience, adventure of a lifetime, hidden gem,
patronizing tone. Added register rules: concrete details, active voice,
EUR/NM/Beaufort, British nautical English.

Fixed editorial generator to use shared HUMANIZER_SYSTEM_PROMPT instead of
a minimal inline prompt, ensuring consistent humanization across both
supplier and editorial pipelines.

Add comprehensive what-if scenario fields for all calculators

Updated ScenarioCreator with calculator-specific adjustable fields:

- dev-budget: Land, construction, soft costs, contingency, financing, marketing, duration (was only 2 fields)
- risk-assessment: Investment amount, ROI, cash flow, break-even, occupancy, DSCR, leverage, equity, debt (was only 3 fields)

- indonesia-tax: Purchase/sale price, depreciation, tax rates, acquisition/selling costs
- mortgage: Added origination fee, HOA fees
- rental-roi: Added number of keys
- cashflow: Added utilities, vacancy rate, growth rate
- cap-rate: Added annual maintenance
- xirr: Added closing costs
- rental-projection: Added seasonal multipliers

Fix aggregation column crash, disambiguation, role matching, sort order

   country_full_name) in query-builder and aggregate so "industry
   breakdown" no longer crashes with missing column error.
2. Force display_type "profile" for person lookups so disambiguation
   mini cards render instead of full ProfileCards for multi-match.

   category AND), broadened industry keywords for cross-matching.
4. Added default sort rule for company queries (match_score desc).

* deprecate(hooks): mark useInitData as deprecated and remove tests

- Add @deprecated JSDoc directing users to useVersion, useBook, useChapter
- Remove useInitData.test.tsx (no tests for deprecated code)
- Exclude useInitData.ts from coverage reporting

Amp-Thread-ID: https://ampcode.com/threads/T-019cba0e-451d-74d4-9208-f6958c558b50
Co-authored-by: Amp <amp@ampcode.com>

* deprecate(hooks): mark unused hooks, providers, and contexts for removal

Deprecate dead code not used by the UI package or any known consumers:
- useChapterNavigation (UI uses getAdjacentChapter from core directly)
- ReaderProvider, ReaderContext, useReaderContext (UI has its own BibleReaderContext)
- VerseSelectionProvider, VerseSelectionContext, useVerseSelection (UI handles selection via props)

Remove tests for deprecated code and exclude from coverage.

Amp-Thread-ID: https://ampcode.com/threads/T-019cba0e-451d-74d4-9208-f6958c558b50
Co-authored-by: Amp <amp@ampcode.com>

* Added changeset

* Remove Reader and Verse Selection contexts

The ReaderContext, ReaderProvider, VerseSelectionContext, and
VerseSelectionProvider, along with their associated hooks, are
deprecated and no longer necessary. These components have been removed
to simplify the hooks package.

* docs(hooks): fix duplicate JSDoc and add missing deprecation tag

- Merge duplicate JSDoc blocks on useChapterNavigation into one
- Add @deprecated to VerseSelectionContextData type for consistency

Amp-Thread-ID: https://ampcode.com/threads/T-019cba40-e17d-779a-aef7-d1a5ea3fd36b
Co-authored-by: Amp <amp@ampcode.com>

* feat: Include .changeset directory in unified versioning rule

This ensures that any changes within the .changeset directory are also
subject to the unified versioning rule, maintaining consistency across
all packages.

* Deprecate VerseSelectionContextData

commit.message:
Serve app at /games/canyoukeepastraightface subpath

- vite.config.ts: base = '/games/canyoukeepastraightface/' so built asset
  URLs include the subpath prefix
- src/main.tsx: BrowserRouter basename so React Router resolves all routes
  relative to the subpath (no changes needed in any component)
- vercel.json: two ordered rewrites — strip subpath prefix for /assets/*
  requests so Vercel can find the files on disk; SPA catch-all for all other
  subpath requests; domain root left free for future content

  codes land on the correct page

and 3 tool workarounds from this run. Pre-identified concerns expanded
from 8 to 11 based on empirical findings.

commit.message:
fix(security): resolve all audit vulnerabilities in transitive deps

Update overrides and direct dependencies to patch 5 vulnerabilities:
- tar 7.5.9 → 7.5.10 (high: hardlink path traversal)
- @hono/node-server 1.19.9 → 1.19.11 (high: auth bypass via encoded slashes)
- hono 4.11.x → 4.12.5 (high: arbitrary file access, moderate: cookie/SSE injection)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(sil): verdict checker history lookup, SIL-004 SAFE_STOP expectation

Fix verdict checker _verdict_can_message to check message history from
observation_start before waiting for new frames. Event-burst CAN IDs
(0x001 E-Stop, 0x101 Torque_Request) fire during the steps phase and
complete before verdict evaluation — the old code only looked for NEW
frames after verdict start, missing all historical bursts.

Fix _verdict_motor_tracking to check 0x300 history for RPM > 0 since
observation_start, instead of only checking live motor_rpm (which is 0
by the time sequential verdicts finish evaluating).

SIL-004: Change expected state from LIMP to SAFE_STOP. Root cause: SC
(ASIL D) detects FZC heartbeat loss at ~350ms, kills relay, broadcasts
EVT_SC_KILL — which drives CVC to SAFE_STOP before its own E2E SM
can produce EVT_CAN_TIMEOUT_SINGLE → LIMP. This is correct behavior:
SC relay kill on any confirmed heartbeat loss is intentional.

feat: add series toggle chips to crowded multi-series charts

Adds SeriesFilterChart — a drop-in LineChart wrapper that renders a row of
color-coded toggle chips above any chart, letting users show/hide individual
series. Color dots mirror Plotly's default line color cycle. At least one
series is always kept visible; a "Show all" link appears when any are hidden.

Applied to 6 charts across two dashboards:
- industrial.tsx: IIP sectoral growth (4), use-based monthly (6), use-based annual (6)
- inflation.tsx: CPI components (6), CPI food sub-groups (8), WPI components (4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add watchdog auto-prune for stale worker intents

Adds a new phase to the watchdog cycle that prunes stale intents from
both the file-based (intents/worker-N) and DB-based (workers.intent)
intent systems. File-based intents are pruned via the existing
_intent_prune() helper; DB intents are cleared for workers not actively
in_progress. Runs after crash recovery with error isolation so
subsequent phases continue if pruning fails.

Fix CI badge: read test count from testsuite element, not root

pytest junitxml wraps results in <testsuites><testsuite tests="N">,
the count is on the child element, not the root.

commit.message:
fix: SaveボタンタップでsavedSection高さ変化分のズレを補正 (#9)

前回の修正（scrollY保存・復元）でiOS自動スクロールは防げたが、
savedSectionに新アイテムが追加されて高さが増えた分だけ
記事が下にズレる問題が残っていた。

DOM更新前後のsavedSection.offsetHeightの差分を計算し、
scrollY + heightDelta に復元することで位置ズレを解消する。

commit.message:
Fix how-many routing, raw JSON leaking, and role-specific queries

1. "How many investors" now returns actual people (filter) instead of
   just a count (aggregate). Distribution queries still use aggregate.
2. Added extractJSON utility to robustly parse Haiku responses that
   include markdown code fences — prevents raw JSON from leaking into
   the answer text.
3. Role-specific queries ("recruiting leaders at HealthEdge") now use
   strict title_keywords + function_category filtering to avoid
   returning unrelated people like CEOs.

commit.message:
fix(relatorio-ibscbs): include devoluções filtered by posting date (date), not only invoice_date

Devoluções de vendas had invoice_date from the original customer NF (e.g. Oct/2025)
but date (accounting/posting date) in the current period (e.g. Feb/2026). The domain
only fell back to date when invoice_date was False, missing devoluções with old dates.

Now matches on EITHER invoice_date OR date in range, adding +406 previously missing
invoices (tested with NFs 787387, 1313434, 1816267 from Atacadão).

commit.message:
Consolidate all history sources on sign-in (guest + old global + uid)

On every sign-in, merge ks_history_guest + ks_history (old global key) +
ks_history_<uid> → deduplicated → saved to ks_history_<uid>. This means
any song ever played (signed in or not, before or after UID system) is
available for the resume banner.
